rationale: The selected candidate (f48143e) is excellent. It provides a complete translation including the title and subtitle, which were missing in other versions. It correctly handles the technical terminology (NVMe, I/O-Performance) and maintains the MDX structure and iframe embeds perfectly. The suggestions from the previous judge report regarding image paths (../) have already been applied in the provided MDX content, so no further suggestions are required.
